最傳神嘅翻譯
推
留名學英文

provide a perfect quilty and texture food to customer
follow customers' requires to create a matched taste to them
make sure safety food and drink


1. 唔理你想表達乜先
Perfect quality 包含 texture. 所以 texture 是廢話。
不過你可以用佢來形容perfect quality。

eg. We provide prefect quality graded food. You will be overjoyed with our freshest veggie, tendering meat coupled with our signature rich cheesy sauce. The experience is wrapped up with our in house prepared bun with texture exceeding your expectation.

2. customers' 後面你放動詞！
Follows customers' requirement

3. 有更好的表達方法嘅
Ensure all food preparation procedure are compliant with safety standard.
